title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Decathlon India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Decathlon India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Decathlon India in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Decathlon India:
Decathlon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Decathlon India!
